'''Alres Demophon''' was one of the founders of the [[Republic Scout Service/Legends|Republic Scout Service]]. Demophon's discoveries included the [[Demophon system/Legends|Demophon system]]; the [[Demophon (star)|star]] and a [[Demophon|planet]] in the [[Star system/Legends|system]] were named after Demophon.
